title: Promise Utility Functions
description: Implement promise utility functions including retry with backoff, timeout wrapper, and promise pool for controlled concurrency.

complexity.time: O(n * retries) for retry, O(n/c) for pool

requirements: Implement retry(fn, options) with exponential backoff
Options include: retries, minTimeout, maxTimeout, factor
Implement timeout(promise, ms) that rejects on timeout
Implement promisePool(fns, concurrency) for controlled execution
retry should call onRetry callback with attempt number and error
timeout should clean up pending promise on timeout
promisePool should return array of settled results
All functions should preserve proper error stack traces

few_shot_examples.prompt: Wrap a promise with a timeout.
